Notorious (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $36,843,682Details
International Box Office $8,128,501
Worldwide Box Office $44,972,183
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,119,003
Total $23,119,003
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,497,596 (55.6% of total gross)
Legs:1.80 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:81.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$19,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,638 opening theaters/1,641 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,753,392

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 16th, 2009 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: March 12th, 2009 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 21st, 2009 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive language, some strong sexuality including dialogue, nudity, and for drug content.
Running Time: 122 minutes
Geographical setting: Brooklyn, New York, New York City
Plot point: Biography, Gangs, Musicians, Non-Chronological
Social setting: Hood Film
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1980s, 1990s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Fox Searchlight Pictures, Voletta Wallace Films, By Storm Films, State Street Pictures, Bad Boy Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
